<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of sebastian/cli-parser. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace SebastianBergmann\CliParser; use function implode; use function sprintf; use RuntimeException; final class AmbiguousOptionException extends RuntimeException implements Exception { /** * @param array<string> $candiates */ public function __construct(string $option, array $candiates) { parent::__construct( sprintf( 'Option "%s" is ambiguous. Similar options are: %s', $option, implode(', ', $candiates), ), ); } }
